description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the exact shell commands: mkdir public, ln -s slides.html index.html, and find -maxdepth 1 -not -path '*.git*' -not -path './public*' -not -path '.' -exec mv '{}' public \; to move all top‑level files except .git and the public directory into public. The job should publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch.
